title: Lachoo Youth Carnival
description: A youth engagement festival featuring music performances, food stalls, gaming competitions, open mic sessions, photography contests, and social awareness activities.

title: Shaurya Cadet Camp
description: A discipline and leadership development camp including parade competitions, obstacle training, patriotic performances, and cadet honor awards.

title: SPUNK X Annual Cultural Night
description: The grand annual cultural celebration of the college with fashion shows, dance battles, live music, award ceremonies, and inter-department performances.

title: Green Desert Drive 2026
description: Campus-wide environmental awareness event featuring plantation drives, water conservation activities, poster competitions, and sustainability workshops focused on Rajasthan desert ecology.

title: TechNova AI & Innovation Summit
description: An innovation-focused technology event with AI project showcases, coding battles, startup pitching sessions, and robotics demonstrations for students.
